calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-04-2009 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar May-14-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Bruce H,. Jackson, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Carol L. Price, who was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendants Nikolai Tehin, Jr., an individual, a/k/a Nikolai Tehin, Trustee Nikolai Tehin Living Trust, or Pamela Jane Stevens, an individual.
Amended Defaults were entered against defendants on March 23, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed on March 18, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Carol L. Price, and against the Defaulted Defendants Nikolai Tehin, Jr., an individual, a/k/a Nikolai Tehin, Trustee Nikolai Tehin Living Trust, and Pamela Jane Stevens, an individual as follows:

Damages/Principal - $421,808.47.
Prejudgment Interest - $0.00.
Attorney's Fees - $0.00.
Costs - $0.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $421,808.47.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
